instructions: Use the Goal and the relevant files under docs/intent/ as the durable product context. Preserve the Foundation, Capabilities, and Surfaces boundaries; shared capability ownership; thin and semantically consistent surfaces; local inspectable state; and recoverable Git and process behavior. Update only the affected docs/intent pages when the change alters documented product intent or an architectural contract. Do not require unrelated documentation, cleanup, or broader work.
name: Intent and architecture
rule: Apply when a Goal changes Refine product behavior, architecture, shared capabilities, durable state, workflow, or a surface contract.
